bonusTasks.claudePrompt: I have completed a 21-day APM foundations course. For my capstone, I want to pitch a product idea: a hyperlocal job board specifically for blue-collar workers in Tier-2 Indian cities, using WhatsApp as the primary interface. Help me structure and critique my pitch across: problem statement, target user, solution, business model, go-to-market, success metrics, and risks. Be a tough evaluator — this is my portfolio piece.
